{{Infobox location
| name = Hive
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[Hive Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A Hive is a massive, organic-mechanical structure composed of fused iron and flesh. These entities can function as independent, animalistic organisms that hunt for resources when not directed by an [[Iron King]], or they can be utilized as strategic military assets. They are heavily defended by various combat units, including scout-ships, drones, and weapons platforms, and the structures themselves possess living walls. Within a Hive, combatants may encounter various entities such as [[Pawns]], [[Shepherds]], and [[Reavers]]. Some [[Hives]] are governed by a [[Bishop]], which is an awakened consciousness that manages the structure for specific purposes. While many [[Hives]] appear as irregular, cancerous masses of metal and biological matter, the [[Grand Hive]] is a unique, planet-sized structure shaped like a skull, featuring white skin and black iron. The [[Grand Hive]] serves as a fortress and has been noted for its immense scale, even being large enough to resemble an asteroid belt. In military contexts, [[Hives]] can be repositioned by the [[Galactic Union]] to form strategic formations, such as a spear-like shaft designed for deep galactic thrusts.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Hive is a unit utilized by the [[Iron Legion]] that originated as a ritual room which was subsequently destroyed. This destruction occurred when the disruption of a ritual caused significant damage to the structure. While the exterior of a Hive is described as an [[Iron]] Hell, the unit projects standard starship shields and contains a [[Bishop]] at its center. During recent events, characters entered a Hive where [[Sola]] may have witnessed certain occurrences.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Hive]] was an [[Iron Legion]] ritual room that was destroyed.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The disruption of a ritual caused significant damage to the [[Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Bishop]] is located at the center of a [[Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c17">''The Captain'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The characters are currently in the [[Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18">''The Captain'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The outside of the [[Hive]] is described as an [[Iron]] Hell.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Hive]] projects standard starship shields.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Sola]] may have seen certain things in a [[Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c27">''The Captain'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Hives]] are units used by the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36">''The Captain'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A [[Hive]] can be delivered.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22">''The Pilot'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“The Legion can attack almost anywhere, if they send a single Hive on a suicide mission.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
